distributionList.emailbody:
Hello,

Please see attached report of all NAVFAC items added or changed or deleted in PICS. This report is of all items that have been added or changed or deleted to Grainger or SLHB catalogs.

Thanks,
Matt

Hello,

Please see attached report of all Naval Shipyard items added or changed or deleted in PICS. This report is of all items that have been added or changed or deleted within the Grainger Navy catalogs.

If you have any questions or would like personnel added to this recurring distribution, please let me know.

Thanks,
Matt

Hello,

Thanks,
Samy Palacios

Samy Palacios
